questions.question: A guitar string has a fundamental frequency of $110\text{ Hz}$. What is the frequency of the second harmonic?
A tuning fork produces a fundamental frequency of $256\text{ Hz}$. What is the third harmonic?
The fourth harmonic of a vibrating string is $800\text{ Hz}$. What is the fundamental frequency?
A string vibrates at $330\text{ Hz}$. Its fundamental frequency is $110\text{ Hz}$. Which harmonic is $330\text{ Hz}$?
questions.explanation: $n = f_n/f_1 = 330/110 = 3$. It is the third harmonic.

questions.question: The first overtone of a vibrating string is the:
questions.explanation: The first overtone is the next frequency above the fundamental — the second harmonic ($2f_1$).

questions.question: A piano string has a fundamental of $130\text{ Hz}$. What is the fifth harmonic?
The third harmonic of an open pipe is $600\text{ Hz}$. What is the fundamental frequency?
Which of the following represents the first four harmonics of a $150\text{ Hz}$ fundamental?
A string's fundamental is $200\text{ Hz}$. What is the frequency of the second overtone?
A harmonic series includes $120\text{ Hz}$, $240\text{ Hz}$, $360\text{ Hz}$, $480\text{ Hz}$, and $600\text{ Hz}$. What is the fundamental?
questions.explanation: The fundamental is the lowest frequency in the harmonic series: $120\text{ Hz}$.

questions.question: A string has a fundamental of $250\text{ Hz}$. Which of the following is NOT one of its harmonics?
questions.explanation: $1,100/250 = 4.4$ — not an integer. The others are the 2nd, 3rd, and 4th harmonics.

questions.question: A musical note contains frequencies of $180\text{ Hz}$, $360\text{ Hz}$, $540\text{ Hz}$, and $720\text{ Hz}$. What is the fundamental frequency?
questions.explanation: The fundamental is the lowest frequency present: $180\text{ Hz}$. $720\text{ Hz}$ is the fourth harmonic ($720/180 = 4$).

scoreMessages.90: Excellent! You've mastered harmonic calculations and the overtone series!
scoreMessages.70: Good work! Review the difference between overtones and harmonics.
scoreMessages.50: Keep practicing! Focus on $f_n = nf_1$ and identifying harmonics from a frequency list.
scoreMessages.0: Review the basics: harmonics are integer multiples of the fundamental, and the fundamental is the lowest frequency.
